_comment: Machine-readable documentation index for docs/. The update_triggers field on each file uses a closed vocabulary defined in _trigger_vocabulary. The rfc_impact map is authoritative — do not maintain a separate RFC checklist; derive views from this structure. Keys in rfc_impact are RFC file paths (without .md extension) relative to the repo root.

files.title: Glossary
files.description: Canonical definitions for plugin-specific terms; must mirror accepted RFC vocabulary.

files.title: SDLC Reference
files.description: Authoritative 8-phase workflow spec — phases, gates, hooks, config layers, validation metrics.

files.title: User Manual
files.description: Practical walkthrough: 8 real-world scenarios, sign-off modes, hook behavior, troubleshooting.

files.title: Review Processes
files.description: Four review tracks: code, architecture, test-case, and test-script.

files.title: When Not to Use
files.description: Anti-use-cases and best-fit conditions for the plugin.

files.title: Enterprise Adoption
files.description: Regulatory/enterprise positioning, role changes, cost model, shipped-vs-deferred roadmap.
files._note: Updates on a business/market clock, not purely a code clock. Hook enforcement not recommended.

files.title: Diagrams
files.description: Mermaid diagrams for 8-phase flow and plugin architecture.

files.title: Diagrams Preview
files.description: Rendered HTML preview of diagrams.md Mermaid output.

files.title: Architecture Diagram Source
files.description: Excalidraw source for the plugin architecture diagram.

files.title: Flow Diagram Source
files.description: Excalidraw source for the SDLC phase flow diagram.

files.title: Capabilities Review
files.description: Capability maturity ratings, integration matrix, RFC-backed roadmap status.

files.title: Comparison vs. gstack
files.description: Strategic positioning: claude-sdlc (governance) vs. gstack (acceleration).
files._note: Updates on a competitive/market clock. No trigger-based enforcement.

files.title: Repo Context
files.description: Canonical repo grounding — principles, capability counts, accepted RFCs, open PRs, anti-patterns. Paste first in any new conversation.

files.title: Session Handoff
files.description: Rolling session continuity file (overwritten each session). Key decisions and open items from the most recent session.

files.title: Workflow Log
files.description: Chronological record of what was built and decided across all working sessions on this repo.

files.title: Scope Ingest & Domain Expert RFC
files.description: Defines scope-ingest agent and domain-expert skill; all implementation checklist items complete.

files.title: Scope Ingest — RFC Discussion Note
files.description: Pre-RFC discussion note for scope-ingest; promoted to RFC 2026-04-25. Historical record of the analysis path.

files.title: Multi-team Approval RFC
files.description: All 5 steps shipped: approval-reconcile.sh, sign-off-multi.md, Required sign-offs block, APPROVALS.md, network-share sync (tier 1), git transport (tier 2), MCP connector stub (tier 3).

files.title: Guided Entry, Session Resume, Multi-role RFC
files.description: All 10 PRs shipped: /status, /start, session hook, plan versioning, /configure, /help + glossary, approval-packet, next-hints, docs sync.

files.title: Guided Entry — PR 7 Degradation Analysis
files.description: Companion note for dropped PR 7; superseded by multi-team-approval.md §3.4–§3.6. Historical failure-mode analysis.

files.title: Opt-in Activation, Suspend/Resume RFC
files.description: Opt-in activation model (.enabled marker with hook guards), enhanced /start absorbing configure wizard (auto-detect repo/CI/stack/tracker), /suspend with SHA-256 + AES-256 encrypted snapshot, re-enable reconciliation with REQ ID supersession.

files.title: Pending Analysis
files.description: Open design questions tracker: items 1-2 open (deferred), item 3 closed/accepted.

files.title: RFC Agent Rules
files.description: Concise numbered decision rules for AI/Claude Code doing RFC work. Must stay in sync with rfcs/README.md.

files.title: RFC Workflow
files.description: Lifecycle overview with rationale — status vocabulary, naming convention (RFC-NNN), stage transitions, archive rules.

files.title: RFC Template
files.description: Copy when creating a new RFC. Includes AI context block, alternatives considered, and implementation sections.

files.title: RFC Notes Index
files.description: Index of companion notes and risk analyses for RFCs currently in flight.

files.title: Plan Command Quality Gates
files.description: Closes gap between plan governance intent and enforcement layer: status check in plan-gate.sh, staleness threshold, scope-delta decision records, low-provenance scope markers, degraded-mode banner, domain no-match note.

files.title: Hook Enforcement Alignment
files.description: Closes four gaps between USER-MANUAL.md enforcement claims and actual hook implementations: phase-gate.sh PreToolUse registration, placeholder field validation for deploy/fix-fast gates, work-item file-level traceability warning, enforcement language audit.

files.title: Maintainer Code-Review Enforcement
files.description: Three-layer code-review gate for maintainer PRs to this repo: AGENT-RULES.md §14 rule, .claude/hooks/code-review-gate.sh Stop hook (warn), and .github/workflows/code-review.yml CI gate. Doc-only PRs bypass (plan/gate files excluded); consuming-repo artifacts untouched.

files.title: Work-Item Reference Validation
files.description: Two-layer work-item existence check: Layer 1 (default warn) verifies REQ IDs resolve to local requirement artifacts and CR IDs resolve to signed CR files; Layer 2 (opt-in) queries detected ticketing integrations for ticket existence/open status with graceful degradation. Extends work-item-validation.sh.

files.title: RFC Lifecycle Quality Gates and Build-Stage Enforcement
files.description: Adds machine-verifiable lifecycle gates plus a build-stage loop and AI-slop enforcement to docs/rfcs/AGENT-RULES.md. Eight changes: (1) .claude/hooks/rfc-quality-gate.sh — warn checks for required sections, second-opinion decision, implementation-plan format, populated implementation table, last_modified freshness; (2) TEMPLATE.md ↔ AGENT-RULES.md §3b reconciliation on implementation-plan format (### PR-N subheadings); (3) inline gate checklists in §2–§7; (4) hook registration in .claude/settings.json; (5) new §3.5 Building procedural section — per-PR loop: classify by changed paths, spawn rfc-pr-reviewer agent if code-touching, run tests/run.sh if hooks/tests/scripts/config touched, run ai-slop-check on doc-touching changes; (6) new .claude/agents/rfc-pr-reviewer.md on Haiku 4.5 — checks scope match, surgical-edit, slop, test coverage; (7) new .claude/hooks/ai-slop-check.sh — grep-based check on §12 anti-pattern list; (8) §3a Second opinion gains required AI-slop-check line. Strictly maintainer-only — every new artifact under .claude/ paths; nothing under sdlc-plugin/; capability counts (hooks=14, agents=5) unchanged.

files.title: Release Packaging & Marketplace Distribution
files.description: Adds marketplace.json, scripts/package.sh (devFiles exclusion, release branch, dist tags), .github/workflows/release.yml (test gate + release job), and docs/PACKAGING.md.
